hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import hashlib, json, pathlib, subprocess, sys
snap = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/snapshots/latest.json')
current_hash = hashlib.md5(snap.read_bytes()).hexdigest() if snap.exists() else None
sentinel = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/.context_injected')
injected_hash = sentinel.read_text().strip() if sentinel.exists() else None
status = subprocess.run(['agentpack', 'status'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if status.returncode != 0:
    subprocess.Popen(['agentpack', 'pack', '--task', 'auto', '--mode', 'balanced'],
                     stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL)
    sys.exit(0)
if current_hash == injected_hash:
    sys.exit(0)
p = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/context.claude.md')
if not p.exists(): sys.exit(0)
content = p.read_text()
if len(content) > 60000: content = content[:60000] + '\n... [truncated]'
sentinel.write_text(current_hash or '1')
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit',
    'additionalContext': '[agentpack: context injected]\n\n' + content}}))
"
